description_long: This object is a tactical pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a short barrel and a pistol grip for enhanced maneuverability. The receiver area includes visible shell holders with several shotgun shells inserted, providing quick access for reloading. The fore-end is ribbed for a secure grip and is connected to a visible pump mechanism beneath the barrel. A tag is attached to the front of the barrel, possibly for identification or inventory purposes. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a standard trigger. The overall design is compact, making it suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black pump-action shotgun with a pistol grip, ribbed fore-end, and visible shell holders on the receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, pistol grip, ribbed fore-end, shell holders, and a tag hanging from the barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the pump and grip, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the pistol grip, ribbed fore-end, and shell holders, with the tag visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and grip, with the barrel and tag extending forward, and the pump mechanism visible below.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbed fore-end and short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
